temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit, green-tinted room, a person's hand is seen typing on a computer keyboard. The shot is a close-up, focusing on the fingers moving quickly over the keys. The screen is dark, making the action the central focus. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a sense of urgency and technological activity, suggesting someone is typing rapidly, possibly sending a critical message or hacking.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The distinct sound of keyboard clicks is prominent, accompanied by a low, tense, and rhythmic electronic score.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a close-up of a computer screen displaying a text message interface. The message, written in Chinese, reads: '有内鬼, 終止交易' (There's a mole, terminate the transaction). The cursor blinks at the end of the line, indicating the message is ready to be sent. (Storyline: The content of the message is revealed, creating a major plot point: a mole has been discovered, and a transaction is being terminated. This raises the stakes and introduces a conflict.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense electronic score continues, punctuated by the distinct beeping sound of a text message being sent.)
